parameters.audience: Public Health Researcher focusing on inequality and resilience

promptSent: Find 3-5 compelling examples, analogies, or mini case studies that illustrate 'Claude Code' effectively for a 'Public Health Researcher focusing on inequality and resilience' audience. For each example: 1) Brief description (2-3 sentences). 2) Why it's relevant. 3) The key takeaway it demonstrates. Prioritize recent, relatable examples.
